title: Raslan
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=Galactic Empire |image= |name=Raslan |homeworld= |birth= |death=[[7 ABY/Legends|7 ABY]]''[[X-Wing: Iron Fist]]'' |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=*[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] *[[Zsinj's Empire]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|When it's not boring, you know that you've failed.''"
"''You're obviously unused to failure.''"
"''You have that right.|Raslan and [[Shalla Nelprin]] regarding a mission|}} [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] '''Raslan''' was an ex-[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] officer who had declared allegiance with [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] [[Zsinj]]. He was the commander of the [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class shuttle]] that transported an intrusion team to the [[Executor-class Star Dreadnought/Legends|''Executor''-class Star Dreadnought]] ''[[Razor's Kiss]]'' still under construction at the [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]] [[Shipyard/Legends|shipyard]] as well as leading the mission to seize the vessel. He was a successful, logical officer, and was unused to failure. He complained that [[Shalla Nelprin|"Qatya"]] made too much noise during her first encounter with a member of the Kuati security aboard the Star Dreadnaught, but was subsequently impressed with her performance as she silently eliminated or incapacitated the rest of their opposition. Raslan would later be killed during the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] fleet's attacks on the ''Razor's Kiss''. ==Appearances== *''[[X-Wing: Iron Fist]]'' {{Ab|X-Wing: Iron Fist (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Raslan }} [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Imperial Navy pilots of the Galactic Empire]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Personnel of Zsinj's empire]]
